title: Service (launchctl)
description: Perintah untuk mengelola service dan daemon di macOS menggunakan launchctl.

commands.name: launchctl
commands.title: Launch Control
commands.examples:
launchctl list
launchctl list | grep apache
launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.example.plist
launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.example.plist
launchctl start com.example.service
launchctl stop com.example.service
commands.notes: LaunchAgents (~/Library/LaunchAgents) untuk user, LaunchDaemons (/Library/LaunchDaemons) untuk system.

commands.name: launchctl-bootstrap
commands.title: Bootstrap (Modern)
commands.description: Cara modern untuk mengelola service di macOS.
commands.examples:
sudo launchctl bootstrap system /Library/LaunchDaemons/com.example.plist
sudo launchctl bootout system /Library/LaunchDaemons/com.example.plist
launchctl kickstart -k gui/$(id -u)/com.example.agent
commands.notes: bootstrap/bootout adalah pengganti load/unload di macOS modern.

commands.name: brew-services
commands.title: Homebrew Services
commands.description: Mengelola service yang diinstall via Homebrew.
commands.examples:
brew services list
brew services start mysql
brew services stop postgresql
brew services restart nginx
brew services run redis
commands.notes: Cara paling mudah mengelola service di macOS jika diinstall via Homebrew.
